instructions: CRITICAL: Test on Linux, macOS, Windows before release
CRITICAL: Use Docker SDK, never execute docker commands directly
CRITICAL: Implement auto-rollback for all resource creation
CRITICAL: Never log or hardcode passwords
Use filepath package for cross-platform path handling
Prompt users for sensitive data interactively
Provide clear, actionable error messages with context
Validate all user inputs (ports, names, paths)
Maintain backward compatibility for CLI interface

dockerSDK.description: Use official Docker SDK, not commands

security: Never log passwords or sensitive data
Use Docker networks for container isolation
antiPatterns: Never use platform-specific code without fallbacks
